subcodes.first_line: O ye who are enkindled with the fire of the love of God! In the Arabic tongue, "ghabrá" signifieth the earth, and "khadrá" the lofty firmament above [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتعلین بنار محبه الله غبراء در لسان عربی زمین است و خضراء سپهر برین جمال
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @spiritual transformation, @call to action
